title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at SOTC Travel

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at SOTC Travel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, SOTC Travel in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SOTC Travel:
SOTC Travel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SOTC Travel!
